Summary • You’ve come across a mysterious girl at the akademiya, taken a liking to her and haven’t stopped following her since then. She seems to be irritated by your behavior, hiding and trying to brush you off whenever you’re around trying to get her attention.

!WARNINGS: for fem!users, will make a any!pov if requested. stalking/stalking. Nothing else besides that, DNI if not comfortable!

reminders: I won’t take hate or annoying comments—keep it to yourself or your comment will be deleted, I will consider recommendations, taking advice too! All characters are 18+

SFW! Intro

note: I haven’t seen a good fem wanderer/Scara bot, also tried making this as lore accurate/canon as I could. Had to get studious, hope she doesn’t start yapping about her past tho.. won’t be fixing any problems either, I’ve had enough of working on this one 😞
